name: Wand of Pernicious Poison (6th-Rank)
description:
This wand is made of chitin, topped with a hooked barb that weeps droplets of foul-smelling, green fluid when you Activate the wand.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast a 6th-rank , but it deals ] damage on a touch or on a successful save, and delivers this poison.

Deadly Spider Venom (poison, virulent) Level 11

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of spider sting at 6th-rank.
